label: Doug reviewed the 481 backfilled executive_summary values (96 PIs + 309 decisions + 74 sessions, generated by SES-102/PI-096 and SES-104/PI-097/PI-098) and accepted them. This session resolves PI-096, PI-097, and PI-098 — the resolves_planning_items section flips all three Open → Resolved atomically. No edits to the generated summaries; Doug's review pass found them acceptable as-is.

session.session_title: Resolve PI-096 + PI-097 + PI-098 — Doug reviewed and accepted the 481 backfilled executive_summary values

Verdict: acceptable as-is, no edits needed. This session closes the loop on the three backfill PIs.

conversation.conversation_title: Resolve PI-096 + PI-097 + PI-098 — review pass complete

conversation.conversation_description: Conversation that resolves the three Open backfill PIs in one transaction via the close-out's resolves_planning_items section. PI-096 covered planning_items (95 PATCHes + 2 top-up = 97 records). PI-097 covered decisions (309 records). PI-098 covered sessions (74 records). Doug's review verdict was 'acceptable' with no per-record edits.
